## Component Name Reference

<!-- Add this section only if the component has public methods. -->

The Blazor Component Name component exposes methods for programmatic operation. To use them, define a reference to the component instance with the `@ref` directive attribute. Blazor populates component references in `OnAfterRenderAsync`, so they are not available earier.

>caption Obtain reference to the Component Name instance and execute methods

````RAZOR.skip-repl

<TelerikComponent @ref="@ComponentRef" />

@code {
    private TelerikComponent? ComponentRef;
}
````
